dc:title: Social Cognitive and Affective Neuroscience (SCAN) Corpus (2017-2026)
dc:creator: Lakens, Daniel
dc:subject: cognitive neuroscience
open access
natural language processing
AI validation
text mining
dc:description: A stratified random sample of 803 articles published in Social Cognitive and Affective Neuroscience between 2017 and 2026, converted to metacheck paperlist objects for validation of AI and text-mining tools. SCAN is a hybrid journal; each article's open-access status was verified individually via Unpaywall rather than assumed.
dc:source: Social Cognitive and Affective Neuroscience, ISSN 1749-5016, https://academic.oup.com/scan
dc:rights: CC-BY 4.0, CC-BY-NC 4.0, CC-BY-NC-ND 4.0, or public domain, depending on the article -- see manifest.csv

dc:provenance.sampling: 100 articles per year (target), stratified random sample, seed 20260620, reduced in some years by unresolved oversized-PDF and non-article exclusions
dc:provenance.oa_verification: Unpaywall API, checked per article (hybrid journal, not assumed open access)
dc:provenance.pdf_source: Europe PMC (academic.oup.com's direct PDF host is Cloudflare-protected and blocks automated downloads)
dc:provenance.doi_matching: Verified against CrossRef DOI used for sampling (2026-06-21)
dc:provenance.quality_audit: 9 non-article notices replaced (8 of 9 successfully), 50 oversized PDFs excluded (14 of 50 replaced), 109 garbled DOIs corrected, 4 missing titles backfilled from CrossRef
